CustomField.formula: CASE( Text(AbacusTimeType__c), "1024","Sonn- und Feiertage, 50% Zuschlag Support/Pikett", "1036","Pikett regulär (12.50/h)", "1037","Pikett kurzfristig (25.00/h)", "105","Militär", "110","Krankheit", "1100","Stundenlohn", "1135","Unbezahlte Absenz", "115","Mutterschaftsurlaub", "120","Unfall", "130","Bezahlte Absenz", "140","Schule, Kurs (bezahlte Absenz)", "160","Ferien", "200","Pauschalzeit", "300","Absenz Teilzeitarbeit", "Default")
CustomField.label: Abacus Time Type Name
